title: ACKS Classic Module Importer
description: Imports classic TSR-era adventure PDFs (B/X, AD&D 1e, AD&D 2e) and generates a playable Foundry world for the Adventurer Conqueror King System: actors with tokens, scenes with walls/doors/lights, journals, and roll tables. Uses configurable LLM and image-generation APIs for extraction and asset creation.
